title: Certificate rotation for all REST API endpoints
raw_changelog: The end-user certificate for all Twilio REST API endpoints will be rotated on April 8, 2026.
before_text:
## TLS Certificates

Twilio REST API endpoints use TLS certificates issued by DigiCert.

Current certificate:
- Issuer: DigiCert SHA2 Extended Validation Server CA
- Valid until: June 15, 2026
- Serial: 0A:1B:2C:3D
after_text:
## TLS Certificates

Twilio REST API endpoints use TLS certificates issued by DigiCert.

Current certificate (until April 8, 2026):
- Issuer: DigiCert SHA2 Extended Validation Server CA
- Valid until: June 15, 2026
- Serial: 0A:1B:2C:3D

New certificate (effective April 8, 2026):
- Issuer: DigiCert Global G2 TLS RSA SHA256 2020 CA1
- Valid until: April 8, 2027
- Serial: 4E:5F:6G:7H

**Action Required:** If you pin certificates, update your pinned certificates before April 8, 2026.
diff_text:
--- before
+++ after
@@ -3,5 +3,12 @@
 Twilio REST API endpoints use TLS certificates issued by DigiCert.
 
-Current certificate:
+Current certificate (until April 8, 2026):
 ...
+
+New certificate (effective April 8, 2026):
+- Issuer: DigiCert Global G2 TLS RSA SHA256 2020 CA1
+- Valid until: April 8, 2027
+- Serial: 4E:5F:6G:7H
+
+**Action Required:** If you pin certificates, update your pinned certificates before April 8, 2026.

ground_truth.breaking_reason: Certificate rotation will break clients that pin TLS certificates
ground_truth.action_required: If you pin certificates, update pinned certs before April 8, 2026. If you don't pin, no action needed.
